case_title: RICHARD K. MARSH ET AL VS. QUINN BERNARD BROWN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-30-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, QUINN BERNARD
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-07-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, YUPING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF RICHARD MARSH AND YUPING LIU ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT QUINN BERNARD BROWN IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSH, RICHARD K. LIU, YUPING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWN, QUINN BERNARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, YUPING AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, QUINN BERNARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,872.00 FILED BY MARSH, RICHARD K. LIU, YUPING AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, QUINN BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MARSH, RICHARD K. LIU, YUPING BROWN, QUINN BERNARD
